name: Cyber posture (failed-login + IPS)
label: SynthBank synthetic data

correlation.note: failed-login spike + IPS signature correlate to one security incident on the internet-banking edge

rootCause.note: credential-stuffing pattern; attribution requires the security feed

impact.derivation: no infra blast-radius traversal — security incident, not a CI outage

recommendedAction.text: Escalate to SOC; consider rate-limit / WAF rule on the IB edge — human attests/executes (RBI cyber framing).

honestGaps: W8 reasoning for this scenario is GATED on the deferred security feed — data + golden are authored, attribution/correlation is not demonstrable until the feed lands
